steps.title: Rewrite the negative exponent
steps.content:
The exponent applies only to $x$. A power of $-1$ means reciprocal, so
$$f(x)=4x^{-1}=4\cdot \frac{1}{x}=\frac{4}{x}$$

steps.title: Evaluate the function
steps.content:
Substitute $21$ for $x$:
$$f(21)=\frac{4}{21}$$
This does not make the whole product $(4x)^{-1}$, reverse the fraction, or make the function negative.
The answer is C.
